columns.extraction_plan: In the Introduction section (pages 1-2), the text mentions that combining novel therapies with ADT at the time of initiating systemic therapy for mHSPC has emerged as a strategy to potentially delay the development of CRPC and improve quality of life and OS. This indicates that quality of life was considered as a factor in the study. However, the results of the quality of life are not reported in the provided text. Therefore, the answer is "Yes, but results not reported".
